title: ジャパンCの後に・Die Herzenslust

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for racing with me today! What are you
planning to run next?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: I was thinking of the Arima Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Really? I was thinking of running that too! Here's
to having another good race if we end up in it
together!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I had a lot of fun racing with you today!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Oh, same here! I'm looking forward to next time!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: So this is what the senior racers are capable of...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...I learned a lot today. I cannot let things turn
out the same next time.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I wasn't able to win, but...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It was. I can sense my own improvement. I'm sure
I'll be able to achieve better results next time.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It seems both Spe and Rob Roy intend to run in
the Arima Kinen.
choice_data_list:
Guess you'll be seeing them on the track again,
huh?

Guess you'll be seeing them on the track again,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen is next up on Eishin Flash's
schedule. The three of them will undoubtedly
clash again the way things are now.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
choice_data_list:
You've already gone against the best two
racers, so you'll be fine.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It is safe to assume that they will be my greatest
adversaries in the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
So in order to win, all I must do is outrun those
two. At least that makes things simple.
